decisions.reason: Current manifest routes the integration lane through check:publish so clean local CI can prove the publish-safe contract while check remains the stricter release-history gate.

Current scripts preserve origin/main backfill:history and add strict validate:release, publish-safe check:publish, local-CI MCP capture, OTEL smoke, source-promotion packet, cockpit, and trust preflight commands.
Current smoke keeps origin/main Worker health release/environment checks, restores provenance-gated recovery gap handling, and adds publish-grace plus GitHub fallback freshness checks.
Current tests preserve origin/main Worker health and recovery-gap assertions while adding publish-grace coverage for the stricter smoke contract.
